full_text:
Zhou Buyi (Yuanzhi) 周不疑
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Buyi (周不疑), styledYuanzhi, was born in Lingling. An able man and skilled writer, friend of Cao Chong. Rejected chance to marry into Cao family, killed when Chong died by Cao Cao. Zhou Buyi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhou Buyi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
